description:
The TSPrint server part is installed on your server or application host you will be printing from.


FEATURES
- Introducing native ARM64 client support
- Improved PDF print on the default print engine
- Improved paper tray mapping for printer redirection

BUG FIXES
- Fixed the issue with client detection on the server side
- Fixed redirected printer permissions on Windows 11
- Fixed issue with invisible custom printers in Printer manager after import
- Fixed issue with twlic type check (Turkish OS)
- Fixed permission issue on the temp folder
- Fixed client print issue when printing using the TSPrintXPS driver
- Fixed copies/collate issue when using TSPrintXPS driver
- Fixed issue with Document Properties on redirected printers
- Fixed issue with print order on User defined printers
- Fixed issue with TSPrint Server silent install
- Fixed issue with redirected printer name
- Fixed issue with frozen window on the client side
- Fixed printing issue from Firefox on Windows 10 or newer
- Fixed issue with XPS not printing on custom virtual printer
- Fixed issue with slow printing on Mac client
- Fixed issue with long printer name on TSPrint Printer dialog
- Fixed print orientation issue with TSPrint PDF
